title: sorbus randaiensis
intro: Sorbus randaiensis, also known as the Randai Mountain Rowan or Taiwan Rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sorbus randaiensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Sorbus randaiensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
